inputs.label: True Airspeed
inputs.businessContext: True airspeed of the object relative to the air in meters per second.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient air temperature in degrees Celsius.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats; for air, γ = 1.4.

inputs.label: Specific Gas Constant
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant for the gas; for dry air, R ≈ 287 J/(kg·K).
